prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次依次约8013名、28383名（2022年出现明显断档异常）、9828名、11885名、17306名。剔除2022年异常值后，2023–2025年呈逐年后移趋势，近3年累计后移约7478名，2025年基准位次约17306名；该校在黑龙江省2021–2024年招生计划均为95人，2025年微调至94人，2026年计划仍为94人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在80名左右，学校层次无明显波动；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件通报；2025年周期亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考）；抖音综合热度排名第77位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量中等偏低；2025年投档异常信号为低关注度，整体声誉对报考热度有一定抑制作用；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的信息管理与信息系统等直接对应；其余工科专业虽未获A评级，但在机械、电气、计算机等领域有较强行业认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为“高热推荐”或“推荐”，社会关注度持续升温；土木建筑类仍处于“分化观望”至“明显劝退”区间。本省2025年物理类考生约117407人，2026年总考生167000人，按近年物理类占比约68.4%估算约114228人，较2025年减少约3179人（-2.7%），竞争压力略有缓解；合肥工业大学位于安徽省（非本省），2025年在黑龙江省招生占比约2.2%（13人/598人），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜效应；近年黑龙江招生人数稳定在94–95人，地域偏好对位次影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17306名、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生减少约2.7%（竞争略缓解）以及声誉偏负面（抑制热度）等多因素权衡，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移（竞争略降），预测最低位次约17106名，区间16606–17606名。

- 计算机科学与技术
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 电子信息工程/通信工程
- 软件工程
- 车辆工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 自动化
- 微电子科学与工程/集成电路设计与集成系统

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间16606–17606名内，建议以二档专业为主力选择（机械类、自动化、微电子、信息管理与信息系统等），一档专业（计算机、电气、电子信息）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（材料类、工业工程、建筑学等）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如16600名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（17600名左右）建议以二档核心专业为主、三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 8013, 28383 (with a significant anomaly in 2022), 9828, 11885, and 17306. Excluding the 2022 anomaly, the rankings from 2023 to 2025 show a year-by-year backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7478 positions over the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 17306. The university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang Province from 2021 to 2024 was 95 students each year, adjusted slightly to 94 in 2025, and remains at 94 for 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, thus no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 80th, with stable rankings around 80 in recent years, showing no significant fluctuation in university level. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct. The 2025 cycle also had a negative bias (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors, some majors with no applicants). On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 77th, with a rating of 'average,' and medium-to-low exposure on short video platforms. The 2025 admission anomaly signal indicates low attention, and overall reputation has a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering received an A rating, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to majors like Information Management and Information Systems. Although other engineering majors did not receive A ratings, they have strong industry recognition in fields such as mechanical, electrical, and computer science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all 'highly recommended' or 'recommended,' with continuously rising social attention. Civil Engineering and Architecture remain in the 'differentiated wait-and-see' to 'clearly discouraged' range. In 2025, the number of physics category examinees in the province was approximately 117,407, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is 167,000. Estimating about 68.4% in the physics category, this is about 114,228, a decrease of about 3,179 (-2.7%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province (not the home province), and its enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang in 2025 is about 2.2% (13 out of 598), making it cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference effect. In recent years, the number of enrolled students in Heilongjiang has been stable at 94-95, with regional preference having a neutral impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17306, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a decrease of about 2.7% in the number of physics category examinees in the province (slightly easing competition), and a negative reputation (inhibiting enthusiasm), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17106, with a range of 16606 to 17606.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering
- Software Engineering
- Vehicle Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Industrial Engineering
- Architecture
- Transportation
- Pharmaceutical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16606 to 17606, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechanical, Automation, Microelectronics, Information Management and Information Systems, etc.) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Industrial Engineering, Architecture, etc.) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16600), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is near the upper limit (around 17600), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 2 core majors with Tier 3 as backups.
